name: xforge-architecture
description: Padroes de arquitetura enterprise: Clean Architecture (Uncle Bob), Domain-Driven Design (Eric Evans), Bounded Contexts, Context Mapping, Aggregates, Value Objects, Domain Events, anti-corruption layer.

knowledgeEntries.summary: Entities, Use Cases, Interface Adapters, Frameworks. Dependency Rule. Uncle Bob.
Bounded Contexts, Context Mapping (Shared Kernel, Customer-Supplier, Anti-Corruption Layer)
Aggregates, Entities, Value Objects, Domain Services, Domain Events, Repositories
CQRS (Command Query Responsibility Segregation), Event Sourcing, projections, eventual consistency
Strategic patterns, como identificar contextos, sub-domains (core/supporting/generic)

author: XForge Engineer
